feature_hypothesis: An AI assistant that auto-summarises customer support tickets.

questions.question: What challenges do you face when reviewing customer support tickets?
questions.user_answer: the number of tickets we get the issue then to prioritize them
questions.follow_up: Can you describe how the current system for prioritizing tickets affects your ability to resolve urgent issues?
questions.follow_up_answer: we sometimes miss the high impact issue in pile of these ticket load

questions.question: Can you describe a situation where you felt overwhelmed by the volume of support tickets?
questions.follow_up: What specific aspects of managing support tickets during the Black Friday sale made you feel overwhelmed?
questions.follow_up_answer: too many sales, too many issues, too many escalation as the response were slow

questions.question: How do you currently prioritize which support tickets to address first?
questions.user_answer: I try and look into top 10 tickets in my bucket and try and do manual assessment on priority based on impact
questions.follow_up: Can you describe a situation where your manual assessment led to a misprioritized ticket and what the consequences were?
questions.follow_up_answer: consequences was that I missed a high revenue impact ticket, while trying to solve a high number of customer impact ticket

questions.question: What information do you find most difficult to extract from support tickets?
questions.follow_up: Can you describe a specific instance where not understanding the impact of the failure led to a significant issue for you or your team?
questions.follow_up_answer: consequences was that I missed a high revenue impact ticket, while trying to solve a high number of customer impact ticket

questions.question: How much time do you typically spend summarizing or organizing information from support tickets?
questions.follow_up: What specific challenges do you encounter while summarizing or organizing the information that make it take so long?
